title: Principal Plant Manager at Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd!
